name: City Sprouts (Revised)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and trim the sprouts and cabbage.
2. Cut each brussels sprout in half lengthwise, then slice thinly across the width.
3. Shred the cabbage to short lengths.
4. Melt margarine in a large skillet or flat-bottomed wok over medium-high heat.
5. Saute shredded cabbage for 3 to 4 minutes until slightly crispy.
6. Add hot water and cook until absorbed, about 1 minute.
7. Stir in lime juice and season with salt and pepper.
8. Serve hot alongside dishes like turkey burgers or cheese sauces.
[67 calories (4g fat / 48.2% CFF)]
Location: Brussels Sprouts, Shredded (Original) in Mesa Mexicana (MCF).
Hanneman collection: Sue Feniger and Mary Sue Milliken (1989) City Cuisine.
Review: This sweet, crunchy vegetable is a pleasant surprise.
